name: cairn
description: Batteries-included glue for three tools — GSD planning, the beads issue tracker (bd), and context-mode memory — behind one unified /cairn: command interface. Installing cairn auto-installs GSD and context-mode (declared dependencies) and, on first session, offers to install the beads bd binary; a single /cairn:init wires a project end to end, and /cairn: verbs drive the combined lifecycle (new/plan/work/verify/ship, plus intent-scoped remember/recall) from one namespace. Mirrors bd issues two-way (hub-and-spoke) to GitHub Issues, GitLab, Jira, Asana, and Azure Boards (optional), and makes the context-mode knowledge base intent-aware (scope compressed memory by active bd issue + GSD phase). The integration conventions activate in repos that use GSD (.planning/) and beads (.beads/).
